global.description: The ad features a solid blue background with bold text elements promoting a travel service.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel service for hotels and flights.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: NomadLaye
elements.description: The text 'NomadLaye' is prominently displayed at the top in bold, large font, creating a strong focal point.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: The phrase 'Escape this weekend' is presented in a clean, modern font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Hotels + flights in one tap
elements.description: This text appears below the headline, in a smaller font, conveying the service offered.

elements.label: Learn more
elements.description: The call-to-action button 'Learn more' is displayed in a bold font at the bottom, inviting user interaction.
The price '$4.99' is shown in a prominent position at the bottom left, drawing attention to the cost.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A small circular shape is positioned towards the bottom center, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape is placed in the center, providing a visual contrast to the text.

elements.label: Top text area
elements.description: An empty area at the top of the ad, possibly for additional branding or decorative elements.

elements.label: Service description
elements.description: The text 'Hotels + flights in one tap' is clearly stated, emphasizing the convenience of the service.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '$4.99' is clearly visible, indicating the cost of the service offered.
